zh.lifeSummary: 當Alexander de Cruwys III於大約1266年出生在英國戴文易亞斯特 安斯時，他的父親Sir Robert de Cruwys38歲，母親Matilda Fitz Payne20歲。他於大約1309年與Constance de London在英國英格蘭戴文結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1331年在英國英格蘭戴文可盧斯 莫爾哈德享年66歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Cruwys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Cruse
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name probably from an unidentified place in Normandy named with Old French crues, crus, creus ‘hollow’. Creuse (in Somme, Picardy) and Cruys-Straëte (formerly in Flanders, now in the French département of Nord), which have the same etymology, are alternative possibilities but seem less likely on geographical and tenurial grounds.
English: perhaps a nickname from Middle English crus(e) ‘bold, fierce’, although the regular development would be to Crowse (rhyming with house).

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Alexander de Cruwys III was born about 1266, in East Anstey, Devon, England, his father, Sir Robert de Cruwys, was 38 and his mother, Matilda Fitz Payne, was 20. He married Constance de London about 1309, in Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1331, in Cruwys Morchard, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alexander de Cruwys III est né environ 1266, à East Anstey, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert de Cruwys, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Matilda Fitz Payne, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Constance de London environ 1309, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1331, à Cruwys Morchard, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 66 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Alexander de Cruwys IIIが約1266年にイギリスデボンエアスト アンステイで生まれた時，父Sir Robert de Cruwysは38歳，母Matilda Fitz Payneは20歳であった。約1309年にイギリスイギリスデボンでConstance de Londonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1331年にイギリスイギリスデボンクルウイス モーチャードで66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alexander de Cruwys III(이)가 대략 1266년 영국 데폰 이스트 앤스테이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert de Cruwys(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Matilda Fitz Payne(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1309년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 Constance de London(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1331년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 크루w이스 모르처드에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander de Cruwys III nasceu aproximadamente 1266, em East Anstey, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert de Cruwys, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Matilda Fitz Payne, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Constance de London aproximadamente 1309, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alexander de Cruwys III родился около 1266 г. в местности эаст ансти, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Robert de Cruwys было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda Fitz Payne, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Constance de London около 1309 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1331 г. в местности крувис морчард, девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 66 лет.
